title: arctium helianthum
intro: Arctium helianthum, also known as the Lesser Burdock, is a perennial plant species in the thistle family native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations, wounds, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Arctium helianthum include its ability to reduce swelling, soothe irritated skin, and support the immune system. Arctium helianthum can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
